nasb.text: Now the coastlands will tremble On the day of your fall; Yes, the coastlands which are by the sea Will be terrified at your passing.’ ”

esv.text: Now the coastlands tremble on the day of your fall, and the coastlands that are on the sea are dismayed at your passing.’

cnv.text: 現在海島的居民在你傾倒的日子， 都必戰兢； 眾海島因你的毀滅而驚惶。

ccb.text: 你倾覆的日子， 沿海各国都战战兢兢， 众海岛看见你被毁灭， 都心惊胆战。’
